ksa_text: Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Design, develop, and implement AI tools and techniques to achieve organizational objectives.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems
Design, develop, and implement AI tools and techniques to achieve organizational objectives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-018 (AI and Machine Learning/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.478, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.478). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. ISO 8000 technical data operations: data entry, validation, verification, quality task execution, and data accuracy maintenance at technician/entry level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.478, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.478)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
